faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Paramus, NJ?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Paramus typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Paramus?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Paramus take 4-8 hours for initial service, with heat treatments often completed in a single day. Chemical treatments may require follow-up visits 10-14 days later to ensure complete elimination of newly hatched bed bugs. We'll create a customized treatment schedule based on your specific situation.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for my family and pets in Paramus?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our bed bug treatments are completely safe when applied by our certified technicians. We use EPA-approved products and methods, including non-toxic heat treatments that require no chemicals. We provide detailed preparation instructions and safety guidelines to ensure your family and pets can return home safely, typically within a few hours of treatment completion.
